description:
You are a security analyst investigating a suspicious telnet session. Extract the login credentials (username and password) from the capture file at /home/ga/Documents/captures/telnet-cooked.pcap using Wireshark. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/telnet_report.txt in this exact format:

username: <extracted_username>
password: <extracted_password>

Use lowercase labels, a single space after each colon, no quotes around values, and no trailing whitespace. Each field should be on its own line.
